rationale: The cited paper is used once in the literature review as an example that scarcity can polarize option preferences. It appears in a grouped set of prior scarcity studies and serves only to support a broad background claim about endogenous scarcity effects. The citing paper's core contribution is a game-theoretic analysis of price and purchase-limit strategy under exogenous shortages, and it does not build its model, mechanism, or empirical setup on Zhu and Ratner (2015).
